attendance_trend.title: Attendance Trend ({period})
attendance_trend.subtitle: Daily attendance rate with average line
attendance_trend.description: Track daily attendance rates over the selected time period. The blue line shows actual attendance while the orange line represents the average. Days below the threshold are highlighted to help identify patterns and take corrective action.

students_per_grade.title: Students per Grade
students_per_grade.subtitle: Distribution by grade level
students_per_grade.description: This chart shows the distribution of students across different grade levels. Use the filters to view all students, new enrollments, or existing students. The data helps identify which grades need more resources or attention.

absence_reasons.title: Absence Reasons
absence_reasons.subtitle: Distribution of absence types
absence_reasons.description: This chart shows the distribution of student absence reasons. It helps identify patterns and take appropriate actions to reduce unexcused absences.

charts.attendance_trend_desc: Daily attendance rate with average line
charts.academic_performance_description: Track academic performance trends over time. Shows positive and negative performance indicators with percentage changes to help identify areas needing attention.
